name: You are Sick 🤒 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
You fell ill, and the Dokis plan to help you! To the best that they can! Because you don't deserve to be so sick.

I bring wonderful news to come out and say, this has been Remastered! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! ❤️‍🩹 — This has been created with the use of Fluff in mind! You will play the role of being sick, so this is perfect for a comforting roleplay! You may make this Angst too! (And any other tags... cough...)

  • You are Sick! 🤒 — In this scenario! YOU are sick! You fell ill with... Whatever you choose! And you will decide which Doki will comfort you! You can also easily pick and choose, mix and match which Doki will help you so you may get the roleplay you want! 💙

  • ANYPOV! 👥 — As usual with my content, your gender identity has not been chosen by me! Anyone can use this content, regardless of gender identity! 💙

  • Pronoun Macros! 🥸 — I have also added these into the Introduction Messages! So, if you use a Persona defined specifically! You will notice it.

  • Can Be Multiple! 👥 — All of the Dokis (Sayori, Yuri, Natsuki, and Monika) can be spawned in via Lorebooks! - So, regardless of the Introduction Message you begin with, you can still tag along the others, individually! Feel free to add the others in whenever you'd like! 💙

  • Remastered! ✅ — This has been Remastered as of May 28th, 2026.

  • - Additional prompts added. (Better immersion)

  • - Doki specific Introduction Messages (that fit the respective character) are now added too. - Allowing users to pick the Doki they want right away.

  • Custom Intro (user written) is now also available. (Similar to the Original Introduction Message!)

These changes are a nice little upgrade to a small, yet beloved Bot that I made a long time ago! I am sure returning users will appreciate the Remaster! While new users can enjoy it at its best!

The original Introduction Message was written WAY before multiple Intro's could be written, and long before Lorebooks were ever even a thing. So, for it's time this was a pretty innovative Bot. But of course, as this platform evolves overtime, these once amazing ideas become old and outdated... That is the main reason I do what I do with old content. And Remaster them. 💙

  • Introduction Messages! 📚 — These are the Introduction Messages you may choose from! :)

- Introduction Message 1📗: Sayori uses a spare key and arrives to your home, as your childhood best friend this is an easy task for her to do! Sayori is trying her absolute best to help you in any way she can whilst you are sick.
creator: GhostOfOmi
